# Inflexions I.T. Services
> Enterprise IT Solutions & Integration — Accra, Ghana

Inflexions I.T. Services Ltd provides enterprise IT integration, cloud services, cybersecurity, managed services, and data-centric solutions for businesses across Africa.

## Services
- Professional Services: IT assessments, AI strategy workshops, cloud migration planning, digital transformation consulting, solution architecture
- Managed Services: AIOps-driven 24/7 monitoring, automated remediation, patch management, security oversight, dedicated account management
- Support Services: Multi-tier support (L1, L2, L3), AI-powered ticketing, automated diagnostics, on-site and remote break/fix

## Solutions
- Network Infrastructure: SD-WAN, enterprise switching, wireless networking, network security, performance optimisation
- Data Security: Endpoint protection, SIEM & SOC, identity and access management, data loss prevention, compliance and audit
- Cloud Services: Cloud strategy, migration (lift & shift, re-platform, re-architect), hybrid and multi-cloud, FinOps, cloud-native development
- Data-centric Solutions: Data architecture, business intelligence, predictive analytics, AI-driven process automation, real-time data pipelines

## Technology Partners
Cisco, Microsoft, Dell, HP, Fortinet, Sophos, Veeam, VMware, AWS, Google Cloud, Palo Alto Networks, Ubiquiti, Yealink, APC

- Website: https://inflexions.tech
